The '''''Startide''''' was a partially constructed [[MC90 Star Cruiser]] that was destroyed during the [[attack on Mon Calamari]].

==History==
The brand new warship was slated to be one of the first completed warships following the [[World Devastator]] attacks on the world during [[Operation Shadow Hand]].

During the attack on the world by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala]], the vessel was remotely piloted into a collision with the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Manticore]]'' by Admiral [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]], who was down on the planet's surface. This move, though costing the ''Startide'', bought enough time so that a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] fleet could arrive to chase off Daala's forces.

==Behind the scenes==
The name ''Startide'' relates to the [[1983]] science fiction novel [[Wikipedia:Startide Rising|''Startide Rising'']] written by [[Wikipedia:David Brin|David Brin]]. This person is thanked in the acknowledgements in ''Dark Apprentice''.
